gaps: No test case covers the 'Free 60 artwork/theme' display on Home Screen or Device Settings screen after firmware update. The bug involves artwork being missing post-update, which is a visual/UI asset loading issue not addressed by any existing test.
No test case covers firmware update specifically from version v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) — a specific baseline version that may have unique behaviors or failure modes during the update process.

No test case validates firmware update behavior on iOS specifically. All existing DFU tests appear to be Android-focused (Poly Studio Mobile app context) or platform-agnostic, missing iOS-specific failure modes.

No test case covers firmware update failure on PTT (Push-to-Talk) devices or while PTT functionality is active. This is a distinct state not covered by existing tests (which only cover 'active call' blocking).
No test case validates post-update UI state verification — specifically checking that device artwork/themes render correctly after a firmware update completes. This is a visual regression gap.

No test case covers the combination of firmware update + artwork asset loading. The bug suggests the update process may corrupt or fail to load device-specific UI assets (Free 60 artwork), which is a cross-functional gap between DFU and UI rendering.

generated_testcases.title: [Free 60] Verify device artwork displays on Home Screen after firmware update from MR1.5 baseline
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds on firmware v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5)
Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Tap [Device Name] → Device Settings → scroll to Firmware Update
Verify current firmware version is displayed as v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5)
Tap 'Check for Updates' and follow prompts to update to latest available firmware
Wait for firmware update to complete (do not interrupt)
After update completes, navigate to Home Screen (tap back arrow or Home tab)
Observe the device card/artwork displayed for Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC
Navigate to Device Settings screen and observe the device illustration/artwork at the top
generated_testcases.expected: Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC device artwork is displayed correctly on both the Home Screen device card and the Device Settings screen header. Artwork is not blank, missing, or showing a generic placeholder. The earbuds and charge case illustration render with correct colors and details.

steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds on firmware v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5), paired to an iOS device
Open Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS
Tap [Device Name] → Device Settings → scroll to Firmware Update
Verify current firmware version is displayed as v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5)
Tap 'Check for Updates' and follow prompts to update to latest available firmware
Wait for firmware update to complete (do not interrupt)
After update completes, navigate to Home Screen
Observe the device card/artwork displayed for Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC
Navigate to Device Settings screen and observe the device illustration/artwork at the top
generated_testcases.expected: Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC device artwork is displayed correctly on both the Home Screen device card and the Device Settings screen header on iOS. Artwork is not blank, missing, or showing a generic placeholder.

generated_testcases.title: [Free 60] Verify device artwork persists after app restart following firmware update from MR1.5
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds on firmware v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5)
Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Update firmware from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to latest via Device Settings → Firmware Update
After update completes, verify artwork is visible on Home Screen
Fully close the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe from Recents or force-stop)
Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app
Observe the Home Screen device card/artwork for Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC
Tap [Device Name] → Device Settings and observe the device illustration
generated_testcases.expected: Device artwork for Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC is still displayed correctly after app restart. No blank/placeholder images. Artwork loads consistently across app sessions post-update.

generated_testcases.title: [Free 60] Firmware update from MR1.5 baseline fails gracefully on iOS — verify no UI corruption
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds on firmware v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5), paired to iOS device
Open Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS
Navigate to Device Settings → Firmware Update
Initiate firmware update to latest version
If update fails (as per known bug): observe the error dialog/message displayed
Dismiss the error dialog
Navigate to Home Screen and observe device artwork
Navigate to Device Settings and observe device artwork
Check that all other UI elements (battery levels, connection status, audio settings) are still functional and rendering correctly
generated_testcases.expected: If firmware update fails on iOS, the error is handled gracefully with a clear error message. Device artwork on Home Screen and Device Settings remains intact and is not replaced by a blank/placeholder image. All other UI elements remain functional. No visual corruption occurs as a result of the failed update.

generated_testcases.title: [Free 60] Firmware update from MR1.5 while PTT (Push-to-Talk) is active — verify update blocked and artwork intact
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds on firmware v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5), paired to Android device with PTT-capable app configured
Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Navigate to Device Settings → Firmware Update
Verify current firmware is v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5)
Activate PTT functionality on the paired device (e.g., via Microsoft Teams or other PTT app)
While PTT is active, tap 'Check for Updates' or 'Update' in the Firmware Update screen
Observe the app behavior — does it block the update, show a warning, or proceed?
Deactivate PTT
Navigate to Home Screen and observe device artwork
Navigate to Device Settings and observe device artwork
generated_testcases.expected: The firmware update is blocked or a clear warning is displayed indicating that firmware update cannot proceed while PTT is active. After deactivating PTT, the device artwork on Home Screen and Device Settings remains correctly displayed (no blank/placeholder images).

generated_testcases.title: [Free 60] Firmware update from MR1.5 baseline — verify artwork loads correctly after update completes on PTT device
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds on firmware v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5), paired to Android device
Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Navigate to Device Settings → Firmware Update
Ensure no PTT session is active
Update firmware from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to latest
Wait for update to complete successfully
After update completes, navigate to Home Screen
Verify device artwork for Free 60+ UC is displayed correctly
Navigate to Device Settings → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode → Environment
Verify Surround level slider is functional and UI renders correctly
Switch to Speech sub-setting and verify Free level slider is functional
Return to Home Screen and verify artwork is still displayed
generated_testcases.expected: After successful firmware update from MR1.5 baseline, the Free 60+ UC device artwork renders correctly on Home Screen and Device Settings. All audio settings UI (Transparency Mode sub-settings) remain functional and render correctly. No visual regression occurs post-update.

generated_testcases.title: [Free 60] Verify artwork asset loading after firmware update + app force-kill + Bluetooth reconnect cycle
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds on firmware v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5)
Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Update firmware from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to latest
After update completes, verify artwork is visible on Home Screen
Force-kill the Poly Studio Mobile app (Settings → Apps → Poly Studio Mobile → Force Stop)
Disconnect Bluetooth from the phone (turn off Bluetooth or unpair)
Re-enable Bluetooth and reconnect to the Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC
Open Poly Studio Mobile app
Observe the Home Screen device card/artwork
Tap [Device Name] → Device Settings and observe the device illustration
generated_testcases.expected: After the full lifecycle cycle (update → force-kill → Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect → relaunch), the Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC artwork loads correctly on both Home Screen and Device Settings. No blank/placeholder images or generic device icons are shown.

generated_testcases.title: [Free 20] Verify device artwork displays correctly after firmware update (regression check — non-Free 60 device)
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 20 earbuds paired to Android device
Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Navigate to Device Settings → Firmware Update
Update firmware to latest available version
After update completes, navigate to Home Screen
Observe the device card/artwork for Poly Voyager Free 20
Navigate to Device Settings and observe the device illustration
generated_testcases.expected: Poly Voyager Free 20 device artwork is displayed correctly on both Home Screen and Device Settings after firmware update. This confirms the artwork loading issue is specific to Free 60+ UC and not a general regression affecting all device models.
